metadata.notes: UFL (by Strikerz Inc.) is a free-to-play football game on Steam. As of capture date, it has ZERO DLC or purchasable packages on the Steam Store. All microtransactions are handled through the in-game store, not through Steam's DLC/package system. This means Steam API cannot capture UFL's MTX pricing. Alternative data sources needed: in-game store scraping or publisher rate cards.
